references.role: painted finish, square portrait scale, breathing room, and runtime oval-crop safety reference only
painted finish, expressive face treatment, and runtime oval-crop safety reference only

conversion.accepted_png: The native output already matched the 1254x1254 card contract and was copied byte-for-byte.
conversion.note: No crop or resize was required before the shipping encode.

visual_inspection.source: Accepted: original cheerful and mischievous adult wizard inventor with curled auburn-brown hair and moustache, plum waistcoat, moss-green coat, abstract clothing dots only, no beans, packages, brand marks, text, frame, or adaptation likeness, and sufficient oval-crop breathing room.
visual_inspection.shipping: Accepted at 1254x1254: WebP retains facial readability, clothing detail, traditional painted texture, crop safety, and textless frameless edges without a visible conversion defect.
